extraction.one_line_summary: FROOME Chris attacked twice in final 4km of Monte Zoncolan, held off charging YATES Simon by seconds for stage win
tactical_patterns: Froome's second acceleration at 4km to go dropped Pozzovivo/Lopez/Aru after initial move failed to create decisive gap.
Yates prioritized time gaps over stage win, attacking Lopez/Pozzovivo separately rather than chasing Froome immediately.
Sky deployed Froome stage-hunting from GC deficit while Yates managed delta to Dumoulin rather than defending stage.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: extended GC lead over Dumoulin while finishing second, showing tactical maturity prioritizing overall over stage glory
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: double-attack sequence on Zoncolan signals return to form after weak opening two weeks
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: neutral: attacked early on Zoncolan lower slopes but lacked legs to sustain effort into decisive zone
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: positive: stayed with Froome's first attack, finished 23 seconds back, remains genuine podium threat
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: lost significant time to Yates on Zoncolan, confirming vulnerability on steep gradients before crucial TT
